globalNews.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
globalNews.summary: The US president's comments come as Iran says an exact date has not been decided.

globalNews.title: Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
globalNews.summary: Not all votes have been counted, but the current trend suggests 55% of participants voted against the proposal.

globalNews.title: Teen shot and buses torched in Manhattan after historic NBA win for Knicks
globalNews.summary: At least 63 people were arrested in the disorder after the Knicks beat the Spurs to clinch the title.

globalNews.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
globalNews.summary: Nobody was seriously hurt as a result of the accident in the Spanish town, local authorities say.

globalNews.title: Fifa to pay Somali referee Artan full World Cup fee
globalNews.summary: Somali referee Omar Artan, who was denied entry to the United States to officiate at the World Cup, will still receive his tournament fee from Fifa in full.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum can quantum-proof accounts for just 7 cents, says Ethereum's Kohaku lead
cryptoNews.summary: The SPHINCS- proposal aims to reduce the cost of post-quantum signature verification on Ethereum while the network works toward a longer-term solution.

cryptoNews.title: Humanity Protocol’s $36M hack tied to suspected North Korean hackers: Quantstamp
cryptoNews.summary: A fake Bithumb email used in the $36 million Humanity Protocol hack points to the involvement of North Korean threat actors, according to Quantstamp.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin stayed near local highs on a new US-Iran peace deal pledge as analysis saw conditions favoring a sustained BTC price rebound.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Trump says Iran peace deal to be signed Sunday, contradicting Tehran
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe said a peace deal, which would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, would likely send liquidity back to risk-on assets such as cryptocurrencies.

aiNews.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
aiNews.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

aiNews.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
aiNews.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

aiNews.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
aiNews.summary: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.

aiNews.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
aiNews.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.

aiNews.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
aiNews.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

economicCalendar.description: Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
